question: Which quarter appears to have the best overall performance based on the stacked bar chart of engagement indicators?

options.A: Q1 shows the best performance because it has the most favorable mix of indicators.
options.B: Q4 shows the best performance because it has balanced metrics across all categories.
options.C: Q2 shows the best performance because it has the highest stacked total.
options.D: The chart cannot determine overall performance accurately because it combines unrelated metrics that cannot be meaningfully added together.

explanation: The chart stacks unrelated metrics (Page Views, Server Uptime, etc.) into a single total. These metrics have different units and meanings (e.g., counts, temperatures, consumption), so adding them together creates a meaningless sum. The stacked height cannot be used to assess overall performance. Only individual metric comparisons are valid.
